test.summary: 7 test failures persist: E2E tests fail due to Playwright configuration error (test.describe called in wrong context), missing hook file (.factory/hooks/paperclip-runtime-support.mjs), CLI test failures for issue-archive-stale-command (3 tests fail with process.exit error handling), issue-liveness (help flag output missing 'liveness', triad reviewer packet field undefined), and adapter-models test timeout (5000ms). These are pre-existing infrastructure issues unrelated to root-cause milestone.

typecheck.summary: drizzle-orm type errors persist in server/src/board-claim.ts and server/src/services/workspace-runtime.ts - package resolution issue with duplicate drizzle-orm versions (0.38.4 with different dependency resolutions: postgres@3.4.5 vs postgres@3.4.8). Pre-existing infrastructure issue unrelated to root-cause milestone.

lint.summary: Lint is mapped to typecheck, same failures as typecheck

blockingIssues.description: Typecheck fails with drizzle-orm type errors in server/src/board-claim.ts and server/src/services/workspace-runtime.ts. This is a pnpm package resolution issue where different packages resolve different versions of drizzle-orm (0.38.4 with postgres@3.4.5 vs postgres@3.4.8), causing type mismatches. Pre-existing infrastructure issue unrelated to root-cause milestone.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add pnpm overrides to enforce consistent drizzle-orm version across all packages, or investigate why different dependency trees resolve different postgres versions.

blockingIssues.description: Test suite has 7 failing tests: E2E tests fail due to Playwright configuration error (test.describe called in wrong context) and missing hook file (.factory/hooks/paperclip-runtime-support.mjs). CLI tests fail for issue-archive-stale-command (process.exit error handling) and issue-liveness (help flag output, triad reviewer packet). Adapter model test times out. Pre-existing infrastructure issues unrelated to root-cause milestone.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: 1) Fix Playwright E2E test configuration, 2) Create missing hook file or fix test import, 3) Investigate CLI test failures for process.exit handling, 4) Investigate test timeouts. These appear to be pre-existing infrastructure issues.

notes: Round 3 re-validation confirms same blocking issues as Rounds 1 and 2. The root-cause milestone work (trace-spawn-code-path and determine-root-cause features) completed successfully and produced documentation in .factory/library/root-cause-setup-time-model-resolution.md. The milestone commits only added documentation, no code changes. Validator failures are pre-existing infrastructure issues that have been blocking validation across multiple milestones (see wiki-compile rounds 4-6, prior root-cause rounds). The milestone work itself is sound - the root cause analysis correctly identifies that setup-time Task spawn model resolution does not use the same path as execution-time resolution. This is a DROID/Factord harness issue requiring a fix outside this repository.
